name: agent-bark-notify-codex
description: Send Bark notifications from Codex lifecycle hooks through ai-assistant.

interface.shortDescription: Send Bark notifications from Codex hooks
interface.longDescription: Agent Bark Notify wires Codex lifecycle hooks to ai-assistant agent-bark-notify so completion and approval-needed events can send Bark notifications.
defaultPrompt: Help me enable Bark notifications for Codex hooks
